title: Concurrency, Cancellation, Timeouts, Retries, and Flake Control · Workflow and Release Recall
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs concurrency, cancellation, timeouts, retries, and flake control from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the bounded execution and concurrency policy under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded execution and concurrency policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build concurrency keys from workflow, branch, pull request, service, or environment identity and choose cancellation from business semantics.
Prevent stale runs and out-of-order artifacts from overwriting newer deployments through revision, environment, and compare-before-mutate checks.
Set bounded job, step, command, network, and shutdown timeouts while terminating child processes and retaining partial evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair
steps.instruction:
review case — A review older deployment finishes after a newer revision, cancellation skips cleanup, a child process exceeds 6 minutes, and retries erase the first failure. Bound concurrency, staleness, timeouts, idempotency, and flake repair. Competency probe: Detect nondeterminism through repeated changed schedules, classify cause, quarantine with owner and expiry, and require repaired regression evidence.

Inspect the Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Separate evidence from confidence · Review Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for detect nondeterminism through repeated changed schedules, classify cause, quarantine with owner and expiry, and require repaired regression evidence. For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair, keep Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.text: For Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair, name the event, revision, actor, permission, runner, dependency, artifact, environment, deployment, and recovery boundary, Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Separate evidence from confidence · Review Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair, trace this concrete input and predict evaluation, shell, job graph, cache, artifact, trust, deployment, signal, rollback, and cleanup evidence before reviewing it: A review older deployment finishes after a newer revision, cancellation skips cleanup, a child process exceeds 6 minutes, and retries erase the first failure. Bound concurrency, staleness, timeouts, idempotency, and flake repair. Competency probe: Detect nondeterminism through repeated changed schedules, classify cause, quarantine with owner and expiry, and require repaired regression evidence.

For Separate evidence from confidence · Review Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair, challenge the documented misconception with workflow, run, artifact, policy, fault, repair, rollback, and transfer evidence: A flaky check should be removed from required status until someone has time to investigate.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review older deployment finishes after a newer revision, cancellation skips cleanup, a child process exceeds 6 minutes, and retries erase the first failure. Bound concurrency, staleness, timeouts, idempotency, and flake repair. This does not satisfy Ci Flake Detection Quarantine Repair for bounded execution and concurrency policy.
